name: Warm Blueberry Cake with Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch spring form pan and line the bottom with wax paper.
3. In a large bowl, beat butter and 2 cups sugar until fluffy.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Stir in lemon juice and grated lemon peel.
6. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and salt.
7. Alternately add the dry ingredients and milk to the butter mixture, beginning and ending with the dry ingredients.
8. Fold in half of the blueberries and pour batter into prepared pan.
9. Sprinkle remaining berries and 2 tablespoons sugar on top.
10. Bake for 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before removing side of pan.
12. For the cream, in a chilled bowl with chilled beaters, whip whipping cream and 2 tablespoons sugar until stiff peaks form.
13. Beat in 1-2 tablespoons lemon or orange liquor.
14. Serve warm cake slices topped with whipped cream.
